text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
<chrname> has made amazing strides<n>these past
few years, earning us both<n>a well-deserved
break.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer <username>?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Next time you have a day off, would<n>you... like to
spend some time<n>together?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: There's somewhere that I want to<n>take you.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Here we are! It's a hot spring hotel!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
What an amazing building! There are<n>so many
kinds of baths here. I'm<n>looking forward to all
their different<n>effects!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I can barely contain myself!
choice_data_list:
What made you want to go to a hot spring all of a
sudden?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I want to invite Meek here to<n>celebrate three
years of our working<n>together, but I figured I
should do<n>some preliminary research first.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I can't look like I have no idea what<n>I'm doing in
front of her, you know?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: All right, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, the hot water felt great! I'm<n>starting to
regret only doing a day trip.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Did you try out the flower bath?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
The hot water combined with the<n>jasmine
fragrance was incredibly<n>relaxing!
choice_data_list: I bet Meek would love that too.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah. She definitely would!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But... I'm feeling a bit dizzy after all<n>those baths.
Could we take a walk<n>outside?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Ahh... I knew the cool air would make<n>me feel
better.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: You know... Meek and I...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, sorry... Whenever I think of<n>Umamusume,
there's something that<n>always comes to mind.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume and their trainers must<n>always
work in tandem.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
We've struggled so much to get<n>where we are...
but it wasn't just the<n>two of us the whole time...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
There were many people who walked<n>by our
side, providing support and<n>watching over us...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Delivering their feelings to us with<n>hopeful eyes.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
The Trainer's Handbook never<n>mentioned this,
but... the support of<n>others really is important to a
racer's<n>growth...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
And that's just one of the lessons I<n>learned in
these last three years.
choice_data_list: Maybe you should write it all down.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hey... You're right. That's a great<n>idea!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I've also learned much from you,<n>Trainer
<username>.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
As a rival and as a friend, you've<n>taught me so
many things that I didn't<n>know.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
And as a trainer, it feels like my<n>worldview has
been broadened<n>considerably thanks to you.
choice_data_list: I feel the same way about you.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, in that case... we both<n>helped each
other out, didn't we?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
With all that I've learned, I want to<n>write my own
Trainer's Handbook<n>now.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I'll include everything from the past<n>three
years—the successes, the<n>failures, and so much
more.
choice_data_list: Have you thought of your opening line?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Not yet. Hmmm... How about...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Find yourself a lifelong rival—a<n>supporter you can
cheer on... and a<n>helper you can be there for.
